title: MX2EnvelopePayloadV8
description: Outer transport envelope for MX2 messages, implementing HPKE, DIDs, Web of Trust vouching tokens, collaborative thread identifiers, and CAS storage references.

recipient.description: Recipient identifier, either a standard email format or a DID (e.g. did:mx2:abc123xyz).

encryptedPayload.description: Base64-encoded encrypted string of the inner payload (containing sender, signature, subject, blocks, negotiatedFeatures, threadId, parentBlockId, and attachments).

ephemeralPublicKey.description: Base64-encoded X25519 ephemeral public key for E2EE key exchange.

signature.description: Base64-encoded Ed25519 signature by the voucher domain public key.

message.description: Human-readable localized description of the error.
